channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.thesixthaxis.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.thesixthaxis.com

item.title: Epic raising the price of Fortnite V-Bucks because $5.7 billion isn’t enough to cover their costs, apparently.
item.content:encoded:
“The cost of running Fortnite has gone up a lot and we’re raising prices to help pay the bills,”  is the first and rather blunt line in a blog post from Epic Games.  This is the same Epic Games that made an estimated $5.7 billion in 2024.

As of March 19th the following changes are being made

V-Bucks Pack Tiers

Pack*

Previous

New

With Epic Rewards* 

$8.99 Pack

1,000 V-Bucks

800 V-Bucks

+$1.79 back

$22.99 Pack

2,800 V-Bucks

2,400 V-Bucks

+$4.59 back

$36.99 Pack

5,000 V-Bucks

4,500 V-Bucks

+$7.39 back

$89.99 Pack

13,500 V-Bucks

12,500 V-Bucks

+$17.99 back

Exact Amount Pack

~$0.50* for 50 V-Bucks

$0.99* for 50 V-Bucks

The Battle Pass has been reduced to 800 V-Bucks and you can earn 800 V-Bucks if you complete it, but the 500 Bonus Awards has been scrapped.  The cost of the Music and LEGO pass have also been reduced to 1,200 V-Bucks, Fortnite Crew will change from 1,000 to 800 V-Bucks, and the Battle Bundle (Battle Pass + 25 Levels) will lower from 2,800 to 2,600 V-Bucks.

Source: Epic Games



https://www.thesixthaxis.com/2026/03/10/epic-raising-fortnite-v-bucks-because-5-7-billion-isnt-enough-to-cover-their-costs-apparently/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
